When the Premier League had TWO undisputed kings of the box! 👑

Thierry Henry vs Ruud van Nistelrooy. What a rivalry! RvN was pure penalty box menace: 95 goals in 150 PL games for Man Utd (0.63 G/G).

But Titi? 175 goals in 258 PL games for Arsenal (0.68 G/G). Not just a finisher, but an artist. The numbers don't lie, but who felt more dominant in their prime? Tell me! 👇 #PLHistory #Arsenal #ManUtd
Lamine Yamal's stellar performances are undeniable, as he leads all players in La Liga with an incredible 8.33 average rating!
The La Liga Golden Boot race is absolutely thrilling, with Kylian Mbappé setting the pace on 25 goals, just two ahead of Vedat Muriqi's 23!

"Forget the modern magicians – who truly owned the #10 jersey? Zidane's icy nerve and balletic grace vs. Ronaldinho's impossible flair and joyful anarchy. One was a World Cup hero with THAT CL volley. The other, a Ballon d'Or wizard who made football a carnival. Both legendary, but only one could make an entire stadium gasp with every touch. Who was your ultimate spectacle?"
The FIFA World Cup Golden Boot race is sizzling! 🔥 Vinicius Junior, Kylian Mbappé, Erling Haaland, and Ousmane Dembélé are all tied on 4 goals, hot on the heels of the leader!
Belgium's Red Devils are on FIRE! 🔥 A sensational 5-1 victory over New Zealand in the #FIFAWorldCup Group G! What a dominant performance. Are they dark horses for the trophy? 🇧🇪 #WorldCup2026 #BELNZL
Lionel Messi has rocketed to the top of the FIFA World Cup Golden Boot race with an incredible 5 goals in just two matches!

Ronaldo Nazário vs. Thierry Henry: Let's settle this! At their absolute peak, R9’s raw goal threat was simply unparalleled. 47 goals in 49 games for Barca (96/97)? That's a different stratosphere of devastating. Henry was a maestro, but O Fenômeno was a force of nature. #FootballLegends #StrikerDebate #PurePower

Forget all the modern tactical hype! Back in the late 80s/early 90s, Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan didn't just win, they revolutionised football. Their compact zonal marking and relentless high press? Pure genius. He laid the foundation for so much we see today. #FootballHistory #Tactics
England takes on Panama tonight in the #FIFAWorldCup Group L! Will the Three Lions roar to victory and secure their spot in the next round? Kick-off is at 21:00 UTC! 🦁🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 #ENGPAN #WorldCup2026
Senegal absolutely demolished Iraq with a commanding 5-0 victory in the #FIFAWorldCup Group I! 🇸🇳 Their attack was unstoppable. What a statement performance! #WorldCup2026 #SENIRQ
